Women's Health

  • Routine physicals, including cervical cancer screenings
  • Breast exams and referrals for mammograms
  • Free pregnancy testing
  • Prenatal care, postpartum care, and case management
  • Family planning and birth control
  • STD testing, treatment, and protection
  • Online classes

When it comes to reproductive health, CMC is a trusted resource for all of life’s stages. From routine physicals to mammograms to pregnancy testing, we’re here for you.

And when you’re ready to start a family, your reproductive health team is ready, too, with the care and resources you’ll need for a healthy pregnancy.

From prenatal care to postpartum care to case management and beyond, we’re your healthcare partner for life.

Locations Offering This Service

  • CMC Channel 701 Channel St, Stockton, CA 95202 (209) 944-4700
  • CMC Dixon 131 W A St, Dixon, CA 95620 (707) 635-1600
  • CMC Gleason House 423 S San Joaquin St, Stockton, CA 95203 (209) 954-7700
  • CMC Lodi East Cherokee & Poplar, Lodi, CA 95240 (209) 370-1700
  • CMC Lodi Turner 2401 W Turner Rd, Lodi, CA 95242 (209) 370-1700
  • CMC Manteca 200 Cottage Ave, Manteca, CA 95336 (209) 624-5800
  • CMC Tracy Central 730 N. Central Ave, Tracy CA 95376 (209) 650-4000
  • CMC Tracy Grant Line 2151 W Grant Line Rd, Tracy, CA 95377 (209) 820-1500
  • CMC Vacaville 600 Nut Tree Rd, Vacaville, CA 95687 (707) 359-1800
  • CMC Waterloo 1031 Waterloo Rd, Stockton, CA 95205 (209) 940-5600
  • CMC Weberstown Medical 87 W March Ln suite 3, Stockton, CA 95207 (209) 395-2510
  • CMC West Lane 7908 West Ln, Stockton, CA 95210 (209) 636-5000

For Stockton Residents

Mobile Community Response: In partnership with the City of Stockton, Community Medical Centers offers an alternative to 911 for Stockton citizens in need of behavioral health services. If you or someone you know is experiencing mental distress, please call (833) 311-2273, 7 days a week, 8:00 am to 11:00 pm. This helpline is for non-violent individuals with mild to moderate symptoms.
